category_sources: source_facts.description says SWORD provides cross-platform tools to write Bible software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CrossWire SWORD Project page.
docs_sources: Official CrossWire SWORD developer page and official CrossWire wiki are documentation surfaces for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CrossWire project identity comes from source_facts.homepage, with the matching CrossWire source repository used as repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes Bible software tooling; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools for module conversion and management.
